# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use [../AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the source of truth for repository instructions.

Load supporting files only when relevant:

- [../ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [../TESTING.md](../TESTING.md)
- [../TYPESCRIPT.md](../TYPESCRIPT.md)
- [../PYTHON.md](../PYTHON.md)
- [../BUILD.md](../BUILD.md)
- [../SKILLS.md](../SKILLS.md)

Prefer existing workspace packages and repo scripts. Do not edit generated output or dependency directories.
